title: ocotea baracoensis
intro: Ocotea baracoensis, also known as Cuban Sandalo or West Indian Sandalwood, is a plant species native to Cuba and the surrounding islands, belonging to the Lauraceae family. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ocotea baracoensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Ocotea baracoensis include essential oils and extracts, which can be used in aromatherapy, topical applications, and as dietary supplements.
